title: 高貴なるピンチヒッター！

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! That was delicious! Now then, what does
my total come up to?

text_block_list.name: Ramen Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
What did you say?! A slipped disk?! You can't
work with a slipped disk! We need to get you an
ambulance!

text_block_list.name: Part-Timer
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm totally good to go! And I can't take a break
now! It's the lunchtime delivery rush!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, this shop is in a tight spot! Perhaps I could
be of assistance?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
So the first address for delivery is... here. If I
really get a sprint on, then—

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but I'm carrying this wooden delivery box...
I'll need great balance! And I'd better choose an
efficient route so the noodles don't get soggy...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hey! What are you doing standing there? You're
in the way.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
So that's long and short of it... Would you mind
lending me a hand with that big brain of yours?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Huh? You want me to navigate a route for you?
And to factor in the cooking time as well as your
velocity? Who the hell would agree to something
as annoying as all that?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Well, it would be beneficial for you as well. You
could get your hands on the data for my speed on
each route I take.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I've seen you on the training tracks recently.
You're always glancing at your stopwatch and
then scribbling notes.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You're always at the track at this hour, yet now
you're here. Could it be that you're at a dead
end? Perhaps your own data is... insufficient?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Tch... Didn't realize the little princess was so
observant...
All right, fine. I'll help!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Thanks! ♪ Okay, let's crack on!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Finished! That was incredible! With your help, it
hardly took any time at all!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, yeah, lay off the cheer, would you? Still,
given all these samples I obtained... I got way
more out of the bargain than you did, no matter
how you slice it.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I doubt that! ♪ Things worked out fine for the
ramen store, and I learned a great deal while I
was running.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
In fact... I bet I can use this experience in my
training! I can't wait for my next race! ♪
